action: Save each news narration script of at least 60 words for each genre, with the current timestamp, for later retrieval.
fallback_action: If saving fails in the future, attempt to retry saving the data to memory.

recipe.steps: For each genre (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, Weather), prepare a key in the format news_scripts.<genre>.latest for storing script data and its timestamp.

Use the save_data_in_memory tool to save the narration script of the genre and the current ISO8601 timestamp under news_scripts.<genre>.latest as an object in the form {"script": <script>, "timestamp": <now>}.
